Instruction
Crouching + Right Click: Switch Mode
Right Click: Harvest or Sowing
enchantment.minecraft.translate_web_gun:
200
Shooting: Weaving Arrow

enchantment_book.re_ranged.description: Note: Used to reinforce bows and crossbows from the Lands Beyond.
enchantment_book.re_tool.description: Note: Used to reinforce working tools from the Lands Beyond.
enchantment_book.re_weapon.description: Note: Used to reinforce reinforce weapons from the Lands Beyond.
enchantment_book.re_shield.description: Note: Used to reinforce elytra and armor from the Lands Beyond.
enchantment_book.re_armor.description: Note: Used to reinforce shields from the Lands Beyond.
enchantment_book.re_saddle: Energetic Heart of a Mystical Steed
enchantment_book.re_saddle.description: Note: Used to reinforce saddles from the Lands Beyond.
enchantment_book.re_horse_armor: Resilient Heart of a Mystical Steed
enchantment_book.re_horse_armor.descript: Note: Used to reinforce horse armor from the Lands Beyond.
enchantment_book.tome.description:
Encrusted with the knowledge of
ancient sorcery, these tomes once
guided powerful wizards in
bending magic to their will.
Within their worn pages lies the
power to control the arcane.
enchantment_book.illumination.descriptio:
Used on: Weapons
Provides illumination of entities,
and blesses undead ones.
Magicka Cost: 1000/usage
enchantment_book.quiver.description:
Used on: Chest Armor
Makes various Arrows higher
stackable, when in the inventory.
enchantment_book.experience.description:
Used on: Tools/ Weapons
Boosts experience gain when
breaking blocks or killing enemies.
enchantment_book.telekinesis.description:
Used on: Tools
Provides an item magnet in a
small radius, when activated.
Magicka Cost: 200/usage
enchantment_book.warpstrike.description:
Used on: Tridents
Teleports the owner to the
landing place when thrown.
enchantment_book.cultivation.description:
Used on: Hoes
Provides automatic planting and
harvesting of various crops.
enchantment_book.motlen_touch.descriptio:
Used on: Pickaxes/ Axes
When mined, ores and logs
are immediately smelted.
enchantment_book.bleeding.description:
Used on: Sharp Weapons
Builds up a bleed gauge, dealing
heavy damage to all targets.
enchantment_book.magma_walker.descriptio:
Used on: Foot Armor
Allows you to walk over lava,
causing it to cool into basalt.
enchantment_book.knife_pouch.description:
Used on: Swords
Provides throwing knives that
refill over time, when in hand.
enchantment_book.fire_burst.description:
Used on: Shields
Creates a large fire burst, that
deals heavy fire damage.
Activated by crouching.
Magicka Cost: 800/usage
enchantment_book.defelct_projectile.desc:
Used on: Weapons
Deflects physical and magical
projectiles once activated.
Magicka Cost: 2000/usage
enchantment_book.chorus_void.description:
Used on: Ranged Weapons
Teleports you to landing place,
if shot while crouching.
Magicka Cost: 200/usage
enchantment_book.seaborn.description:
Used on: Tridents
Grants various effects during rain or
in water. Negatives effects if not.
enchantment_book.greatblade_defence.desc:
Used on: Weapons
Summons 3-7 magical blades used
as projectiles.
Crouch to launch all.
Magicka Cost: 1000/usage
enchantment_book.bounty_claim.descriptio:
Used on: Weapons
Increases the drop rate of silver coins
on raid mobs.
enchantment_book.lightning_rod.descripti:
Used on: Ranged Weapons/ Maces
Can summon a lightning bolt
on hit enemies, if sky visible.
enchantment_book.bonecaller.description:
Used on: Sharp Weapons
Conjures a skull around the caster,
which deals heavy wither damage.
Magicka Cost: 1000/usage
enchantment_book.evoker_fangs.descriptio:
Used on: Weapons
When activated, conjures aggressive
fangs around the caster.
Magicka Cost: 2000/usage
enchantment_book.star_shard.description:
Used on: Sharp Weapons
When activated, conjures a star shard,
which attacks the nearest target.
Magicka Cost: 400/usage
enchantment_book.tongue_of_fire.descript:
Used on: Ranged Weapons
Builds up a fire gauge, causing
the target to explode in flames.
enchantment_book.disarming.description:
Used on: Weapons
When activated, a curse forces
near enemies to drop their weapon.
Magicka Cost: 4000/usage
enchantment_book.retalliation.descriptio:
Used on: Shields
Absorbs dealt damage until fully charged.
Creates a save area for a short duration.
Charged by blocking attacks.
enchantment_book.blackthorn.description:
Used on: Ranged Weapons
Turns every single shot arrow into a
withering arrow.
enchantment_book.seppuku.description:
Used on: Sharp Weapons
Sacrifices health for damage increase.
Can be done while crouching.
Magicka Cost: 2000/usage
enchantment_book.lightning_strike.descri:
Used on: Maces
Summons a circle of lightning bolts.
Magicka Cost: 2000/usage
enchantment_book.inner_echo.description:
Used on: Swords
Brings the weapon to life,
which scares nearby creepers.
enchantment_book.star_shower.description:
Used on: Weapons
When activated, conjures a fire sphere,
which burns nearby targets.
Magicka Cost: 8000/usage
enchantment_book.void_sphere.description:
Used on: Maces
When activated, conjures a void orb
that pulls targets in.
Magicka Cost: 16000/usage
enchantment_book.light_wave.description:
Used on: Swords
Releases a wave of golden light,
dealing heavy holy damage.
Magicka Cost: 2000/usage
enchantment_book.mistbreaker.description:
Used on: Elytras
Teleports the caster between dimensions.
Magicka Cost: 16000/usage
dialog.mistbreaker_1: Choose a realm to venture unto.
item.soul_tear.description: Contains the soul of a fallen enemy.
item.strong_rocket.description: An elytrarocket with a 3 times longer flighttime.
item.arena_ticket.description:
Allows you to fight against
different challengers.
Hold with offhand while in
the arena to start the fight.
item.furnace_furnace.description:
An ancient forge, infused with the power of a nether star.
This furnace burns with an endless flame that rarely fades.
item.furnace_blast.description:
An ancient forge, infused with the power of a nether star.
This blast furnace burns with an endless flame that rarely fades.
item.furnace_smoker.description:
An ancient forge, infused with the power of a nether star.
This smoker burns with an endless flame that rarely fades.
item.arrow_poisoning.description: Effective against armor, slowly but surely.
item.arrow_levitating.description: What goes up, always comes down.
item.arrow_withering.description: Puts the curse of withering on enemies.
item.arrow_fire.description:
With a bag of incendiary gunpowder
attached to the shaft, it spreads
fire at landing place.
item.arrow_frostbite.description: Traps enemies in an icy jail.
item.arrow_hypnotizing.description: Turns lower enemies into companions for 25s.
item.arrow_weaving.description:
With two bags of silk and gunpowder
attached to the shaft, it spreads
a cobweb at landing place.
item.arrow_shockwave.description:
Infused with pure magical energy,
this arrow will push all foes aside,
paralyzing them for a brief moment.
item.arrow_spider.description: Summons a cave spider for a short duration on landing spot.
item.pelt.description: Grants higher prices at some traders.
item.bee_beenest.description: Perfect for aggressive pollination in a large area.
item.bee_beehive.description:
Perfect for every new beekeeper.
Contains a few bees.
item.bee_honey.description: The Beekeeper promises a very positive effect.
item.food_howlers.description: Saturation for men and its best friend.
item.food_ale.description: A traditional beer brewed from malted barley, hops, yeast, and water.
item.food_wine.description:
A warm and spiced beverage made
by simmering red wine with
cinnamon sticks, cloves, star
anise, orange peel, and sugar.
item.food_mead.description:
An ancient fermented honey
drink, varies in sweetness and
dryness. Often featuring herbs or
spices for added flavor.
item.food_beef.description:
Haste I
Strength I
A hearty dish made with chunks of
beef, root vegetables like carrots,
onions, and potatoes, simmered in a
savory broth seasoned with herbs
and spices.
item.food_chicken.description:
Regeneration I
Speed I
A comforting stew made with tender
chicken pieces, assorted vegetables
such as celery, peas, and turnips,
cooked together in a flavorful
chicken broth.
item.food_fisherman.description:
Dolphin's Grace I
A rustic seafood stew made with a
variety of fish and shellfish such
as cod, shrimp, mussels, and clams,
simmered in a tomato-based broth
with aromatic herbs and garlic.
item.food_lamb.description:
Healthboost I
Resistance I
A rich and satisfying stew
featuring tender pieces of lamb,
barley grains, and vegetables like
carrots, onions, and leeks, cooked
slowly until the flavors meld together.
item.food_sausage.description:
Speed I
Jump Boost I
A hearty stew made with white beans,
smoked sausage or bacon and
seasonal vegetables, simmered
together until the beans are tender
and the flavors are well blended.
item.food_venison.description:
Strength I
Resistance I
A robust stew made with lean
venison meat, root vegetables, and
mushrooms, simmered in a rich red
wine broth flavored with juniper
berries, thyme, and bay leaves.
equipment.saddle_1.description:
The Leather Saddle is a simple yet reliable choice for horse riders.
It provides the basic comfort and stability needed for a comfortable
ride, ensuring a pleasant journey through the lands beyond.
equipment.saddle_2.description:
The Racing Saddle is a specially crafted saddle designed for speed enthusiasts. It enhances the
horse's natural swiftness, granting it an additional level of speed and
making it a prime choice for thrilling races and swift journeys.
equipment.saddle_3.description:
The Superior Saddle is a masterfully crafted piece that
takes horse speed to new heights. With a remarkable increase in speed,
it propels your steed to unparalleled swiftness, making it
the ultimate choice for races and expeditions.
equipment.saddle_4.description:
The Mastercrafted Saddle is a work of true artistry and engineering
excellence. It bestows upon your loyal companion an extraordinary
speed boost, propelling it to unmatched velocities.
equipment.saddle_5.description:
A saddle glowing with divine light, imbued with celestial
power that grants your horse unparalleled speed. It feels as
if the steed is propelled by otherworldly forces, allowing it
to glide effortlessly over the ground, transcending the
boundaries of the natural world.
equipment.horse_armor_1.description:
The Light Horse Armor is a lightweight and flexible choice for
those seeking protection without compromising mobility.
equipment.horse_armor_2.description:
The Steel Horse Armor is a sturdy and resilient piece of
equipment for your loyal steed. Crafted with the finest iron, it
provides superior protection.
equipment.horse_armor_3.description:
The Heavy Horse Armor is a marvel of craftsmanship and elegance,
adorned with intricate designs and luxurious materials. This
prestigious armor is fit for the most discerning riders and their
noble steeds.
equipment.horse_armor_4.description:
The Platted Horse Armor is a testament to the skill and artistry
of the finest armorers. Carefully crafted with rare materials and
enchantments, it bestows the horse with extraordinary protection. This
prestigious armor is reserved for the bravest of steeds, ready to
face the most perilous of battles.
equipment.horse_armor_5.description:
Fire Resistance
This enchanted armor, forged in the infernal depths of the
Molten Abyss, not only offers unparalleled protection but also
lightens your horse's burden. Imbued with netherite's resilient essence, it strengthens your
steed and allows it to move with a supernatural agility, defying
the weight of the world.
equipment.amethyst_bow.description:
A weapon from beyond the mist.
Very High Durability
Teleports you to landing place,
if shot while crouching.
equipment.mistbreaker_wings.description:
An armor from beyond the mist
Nearly unbreakable and expanding
health of the wearer.
Teleports the caster between dimensions.
equipment.lightbringer.description:
A weapon from the old age.
Very High Durability
Creates a wave of light
dealing heavy damage.
equipment.fiery_elytra.description:
Looted from a Veilbreakers ship,
this elytra provide a wonderful
opportunity to travel.
Activated by crouching.
Magicka Cost: 800/usage
equipment.wafer_thin_elytra.description:
Looted from a Veilbreakers ship,
this elytra provide a wonderful
opportunity to travel.
equipment.camouflaging_elytra.descriptio:
Looted from a Veilbreakers ship,
this elytra provide a wonderful
opportunity to travel.
artifact.ring_1.description:
A magic-infused topaz boosts
the wearer's magicka regeneration,
if equipped.
artifact.ring_2.description:
A magic-infused emerald turns
the wearer nearly invisible,
if equipped.
artifact.ring_3.description:
A magic-infused ruby transforms
suffered damage into health, if equipped.
Requires magicka to function.
artifact.ring_4.description:
A magic-infused golden beryl reduces
magicka costs of spell casting
by 25% ,if equipped.
artifact.evasive_shard.description:
An artifact from the old age.
Prevents the wearer from entering
any boss fight, when held with offhand.
artifact.luck_book.description:
An artifact from the old age.
More loot can be found in chests
and barrels, when held with offhand.
artifact.breeding_stone.description:
A rune of unity, that awakens love in all beings.
Magicka Cost: 8000/usage
Usage 1/day
crystal.glowstone_refined.description: Used for Plentiful Potions in a cauldron.
crystal.glowstone_potent.description: Used for Vigorous Potions in a cauldron.
advancement.description.alchemy_crafting: Unlocks minor potion recipes for the crafting table

Unlocks normal potion recipes for the crafting table
Unlocks splash potion variants for the crafting table

Unlocks plentiful potion recipes for the cauldron
Unlocks lingering potion variants for the crafting table

advancement.description.alchemy_physicia:
+1 healing potion strength
+25% magicka potion strength

+2 healing potion strength
+50% magicka potion strength
advancement.description.alchemy_refineme:
Unlocks Refined Glowstone Dust
Unlocks Lesser Soul Crystral

Unlocks Potent Glowstone Dust
Unlocks Common Soul Crystral
advancement.description.alchemy_potion_b: Adds a 33% chance for increased potion potency
Adds a 33% chance to spawn an area effect cloud
skill.book_unlock_1.description: Can be used to unlock novice skills
skill.book_unlock_2.description: Can be used to unlock apprentice skills
skill.book_unlock_3.description: Can be used to unlock adept skills
skill.book_unlock_4.description: Can be used to unlock expert skills
skill.book_unlock_5.description: Can be used to unlock master skills
skill.level_reduce_skill_level: Note: By reducing the book skill level, no experience is returned!

rune.message.modifier_success: By the might of an ancient rune, ye have permanently increased thy

rune.message.modifier_success_max_compan: Increases the player's simultaneous companion count
